projectDescription: Orbis is an AI-powered contact relationship management platform that helps you manage contacts, track interactions, sync communications, and nurture relationships with your network.
keyFeatures: Contact management with rich profiles, tags, and custom fields
Interaction tracking for calls, meetings, emails, and notes
Google Calendar and Gmail two-way sync
LinkedIn archive import and profile enrichment
AI-powered deep search across your network
Automated AI agents for relationship intelligence
Campaigns for outreach and follow-up workflows
Custom objects for flexible data modeling
CSV import with LinkedIn profile support
Dark/light mode and RTL language support
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/sign-in — Email/password and Google OAuth sign-in
POST /auth/sign-up — Create a new user account
GET /contacts — List contacts with filtering and pagination
POST /contacts — Create a new contact
GET /contacts/:id — Get a single contact with full profile
PATCH /contacts/:id — Update contact details
DELETE /contacts/:id — Delete a contact
POST /contacts-import-csv — Bulk import contacts from CSV
GET /companies — List companies
POST /companies — Create a new company
GET /calendar-events — List calendar events synced from Google
POST /google-oauth — Initiate Google OAuth flow for Gmail/Calendar/Contacts
POST /deep-search — Semantic search across contacts and interactions
POST /generate-embeddings — Generate vector embeddings for contacts
POST /agent-task-runner — Trigger an AI agent task
POST /campaigns — Create and manage outreach campaigns
POST /linkedin-archive-upload — Upload LinkedIn data export
GET /search — Full-text search across the CRM
POST /notes — Create or update collaborative notes
POST /tasks — Create tasks and reminders
GET /dashboard — Fetch analytics and relationship metrics
